action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Analysis: This is FMoW (Functional Map of the World) from WILDS - a satellite image classification task with temporal/geographic distribution shift. The worst-region accuracy metric means I need to balance performance across all 5 regions. CLIP ViT-L/14 is pre-downloaded and should provide excellent features for this task. Decision: Write train.py using CLIP ViT-L/14 with a classification head, use multi-GPU training with DataParallel, add augmentation, and do a quick 3-epoch run to validate the pipeline and get a baseline score.
